heading: Petitions
label: 7451 Petitions

children.heading: Fees
children.label: a Fees
children.text: The Tax Court is authorized to impose a fee in an amount not in excess of $60 to be fixed by the Tax Court for the filing of any petition.

children.heading: Tolling of time in certain cases
children.label: b Tolling of time in certain cases

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this title, in any case (including by reason of a lapse in appropriations) in which a filing location is inaccessible or otherwise unavailable to the general public on the date a petition is due, the relevant time period for filing such petition shall be tolled for the number of days within the period of inaccessibility plus an additional 14 days.

children.label: A
children.text: the office of the clerk of the Tax Court, or

children.label: B
children.text: any on-line portal made available by the Tax Court for electronic filing of petitions.
